bench_setup.notes: ADC loopback: PA0 (GPIO output) drives high/low, PA1 (ADC1_IN1, analog) reads back. 5 cycles for PASS. Thresholds: high>3000, low<500 (12-bit). ADC PCLK2/2=4MHz, 239.5-cycle sample, software trigger. FAIL: error_code=0x01 (high too low), 0x02 (low too high).

peripheral_signals.notes: GPIO output push-pull. Wire: PA0 -> PA1.
ADC1_IN1, analog mode, no pull. Wire: PA0 -> PA1.
